title: Full-Stack Live Demos (21 Projects)
content:
# 🚀 Python Full-Stack Demo Projects

**Interactive Showcase of 21+ Python Projects**

---

## 🌐 Live Demos

Visit the interactive demo showcase:

**[View All Python Demos](./python-demos/index.html)** 👈 Click here!

---

## 📚 What's Included

### Part 1: Python Fundamentals (Hours 1-10)
1. ✅ Simple Calculator
2. ✅ Grade Calculator
3. ✅ Advanced Calculator (with scientific functions)
4. ✅ Todo App (CLI)
5. ✅ Contact Manager
6. ✅ Student Management System

### Part 2: Backend Development (Hours 11-20)
7. ✅ Blog System (OOP)
8. ✅ Library Management
9. ✅ Blog with SQLite
10. ✅ Blog with SQLAlchemy ORM
11. ✅ Blog with MongoDB
12. ✅ Flask Basic API
13. ✅ Flask Blog API
14. ✅ Authentication System
15. ✅ Data Visualization

### Part 3: Frontend Development (Hours 21-30)
16. ✅ HTML & CSS Basics
17. ✅ JavaScript Essentials
18. ✅ React Basics

### Part 4: Advanced Backend (Hours 31-40)
19. ✅ Async Web Scraper
20. ✅ GraphQL API
21. ✅ Real-Time Chat Application

---

## 🎯 Technologies Used

- **Backend:** Python, Flask, FastAPI
- **Frontend:** React, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, SQLite
- **Tools:** Docker, Git, SQLAlchemy

---

## 🏃‍♂️ Try It Yourself

### Local Development
```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/samba425/tech-mastery-notebooks.git

# Navigate to demos
cd tech-mastery-notebooks/pythonclass/demo-projects

# Start with Docker
docker-compose up -d

# Access demos
# http://localhost:8080 - All demos
# http://localhost:3000 - React app
# http://localhost:5001 - Backend API
```

---

## 🎓 Learning Path

This is part of the **40-Hour Python Full-Stack Development** course:

- **Hours 1-10:** Python Fundamentals
- **Hours 11-20:** Backend Development
- **Hours 21-30:** Frontend Development
- **Hours 31-40:** Advanced Topics

---

## ✨ Features

✅ Interactive demos you can run in your browser  
✅ Complete source code for each project  
✅ Step-by-step tutorials  
✅ Real-world applications  
✅ Production-ready code
